code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut evens = ""
mut odds = ""
mut cur = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n + 1
  mut is_ws = false
  mut b = 0
  if i == n
    is_ws = true
  else
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(x)
      b = x
    when None
      b = 0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      is_ws = true
    end
  end
  if is_ws
    if not string.is_empty(cur)
      match string.parse_int(cur)
      when Some(v)
        if v % 2 == 0
          if string.is_empty(evens)
            evens = "#{v}"
          else
            evens = "#{evens} #{v}"
          end
        else
          if string.is_empty(odds)
            odds = "#{v}"
          else
            odds = "#{odds} #{v}"
          end
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      cur = ""
    end
  else
    cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println("evens=#{evens}")
println("odds=#{odds}")
